frama_c_wp.reason: Frama-C WP plugin is not installed in this environment.

blocking_items: KCI_SET_WX page binding between approved artifact bytes and execute-enabled GPA ranges
device qualification, ACS verification, and safe reset/FLR for passthrough

modules.name: vmx.c
modules.description: Intel VT-x capability probing and leaf behavior

modules.name: partition.c
modules.description: Partition lifecycle, VM lifecycle, mapping, and shared-memory policy

modules.name: security.c
modules.description: KCI, KSI, IKS, SKS, UVS retained C service logic

modules.name: kernel.c
modules.description: Hypervisor state initialization and platform gating

modules.name: cpu_security.c
modules.description: CPU feature detection and mitigation state computation

current_fail_closed_gates.reason: Executable-page byte binding is not implemented strongly enough in the retained C model.
Authoritative device qualification, ACS validation, interrupt remapping, and safe reset/FLR are not implemented.
IOMMU and boot-integrity detection do not yet provide authoritative platform bring-up evidence.

trusted_service_modules.scope: Trusted-service partitions defined by the FBVBS design

design_principles.dual_language_architecture: Microhypervisor logic is retained in C11 + ACSL; trusted services are planned in Ada/SPARK.
design_principles.separation_of_concerns: Hardware ownership remains in the microhypervisor; policy decisions remain in trusted services.
design_principles.assurance_boundary: Current repository evidence is analyzer + tests, with optional Frama-C WP when the plugin is available.
